title: Nexus-side calibration endpoint for inference providers

tasks.title: Add `POST /api/inference/calibrate/{id}` in hex-nexus/src/routes/inference.rs that runs a 2-prompt probe (identity + short reasoning) through the same in-process inference pipeline used by inference_complete (NOT a fresh outbound HTTP call) so vault-only secrets resolve. Compute quality_score = (0.70 + latency_bonus + sanity_bonus).clamp(0,1) using the same formula as the existing inference.rs:1088 path. PATCH the endpoint record with the new quality_score and healthCheckedAt. Return JSON {id, latency_ms, quality_score, sanity_ok, model, sample_reply}.

Add `POST /api/inference/calibrate-all` that lists all registered endpoints, calls calibrate_endpoint serially with a 5s gap between calls (rate-limit safety), skips entries with status=disabled, and returns a JSON array of summaries.
Register both routes in the axum router builder (the same module that already registers /api/inference/complete and /api/inference/health).

phases.title: Manual smoke test (after build + nexus restart)

tasks.title: Restart hex-nexus, then `curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5555/api/inference/calibrate/openrouter-kimi-k2-6` and confirm non-zero quality_score in the response body and in `hex inference list`.
